env.name: OPENAI_API_KEY
env.reason: Required by ChatOpenAI for the router and specialist agents.

env.name: OPENAI_MODEL
env.reason: Optional override for the LangGraph tutor model selection.

env.name: TUTOR_LEARNER_ID
env.reason: Optional stable learner id for persisted progress and resume behavior.

env.name: TUTOR_DB
env.reason: Optional SQLite progress-store path used by the tutor tools.

env.name: RELAI_SIMULATOR_THREAD_ID
env.reason: Optional fixed LangGraph thread id when a test needs stable graph-session replay.

env.name: RELAI_SIMULATOR_CHECKPOINT_DB
env.reason: Optional SQLite checkpoint path for LangGraph conversation state.
